sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، الِاسْتِمَاعُ أَهَمُّ مِنَ الْكَلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, slušanje je važnije od govora.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, listening is more important than speaking.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ تَسْمَعُ جَيِّدًا تَفْهَمُ النَّاسَ أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: Kada dobro slušaš, bolje razumiješ ljude.
sentences.translationEn: When you listen well you understand people more.

sentences.arabic: كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الْمَشَاكِلِ تَحِلُّ حِينَ يَسْمَعُ كُلُّ شَخْصٍ الْآخَرَ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi problemi se rješavaju kada svako sluša drugoga.
sentences.translationEn: Many problems are solved when every person listens to the other.

sentences.arabic: أُحَاوِلُ أَنْ أَسْتَمِعَ بِاهْتِمَامٍ حِينَ يَتَحَدَّثُ أَحَدٌ مَعِي.
sentences.translation: Trudim se pažljivo slušati kada mi neko govori.
sentences.translationEn: I try to listen attentively when someone speaks to me.
